back_translation: Brothers and sisters, if anyone is found having a transgression in some matter, you who are spiritual should restore that person with a heart of polite-gentleness, with you yourself watching out, lest you also be tempted
Carry one another's burdens, then you all will bring the law of Christ to fulfillment
For if anyone thinks that himself is an important person while not being anything at all, he deceives himself
But let each person examine his own actions, then he will have ground for pride in himself alone, not in comparison with others
For each person will have to bear his own burden
The one who receives instruction in the word should share together in all good things with the teacher
Do not be deceived; God does not allow [Himself] to be mocked, for whatever a person sows, that they will also reap
Because the one who sows into the flesh of his own will reap decay from that flesh, but the one who sows into the Spirit will reap eternal life from that Spirit
Let us not become weary in doing good, for if we do not lose heart, we will reap at the appropriate time
Therefore, when we have opportunity, let us do good toward all people, especially toward the family of the faith
Behold, I have written to you all with letters of-what-large size, with my own hand
All those who want to create a good-looking image according to the flesh, they are trying to compel you to be circumcised, only so that they will not be persecuted because of the cross of Christ
For even those who get circumcised themselves do not keep the Law, but they want you to be circumcised, so that they may boast in your flesh

But may I have no way of boasting in anything at all, except in the cross of our Lord Jesus Christ; through that cross, the world has been crucified to me, and I have been crucified to the world already
For circumcision or non-circumcision has no value at all; only the new creation
And to all who walk according to this standard, may peace and divine-mercy be upon them, and upon the Israel of God
From now on, may no one come to cause trouble for me, for I bear the brand-marks of Jesus on my body already
Brothers and sisters, may the grace of our Lord Jesus Christ abide with the spirit of you all. Amen
